title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models

### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] feat(agent): implement per-tab model switching with metadata restore
summary:
Allow each chat tab to use an independent AI model without affecting
global API configuration. The model is resolved at task init time
(from explicit modelName or last-used metadata), and can be switched
mid-conversation via askResponse. Task now tracks its own apiProviderId
to avoid cross-task

title: [PR] feat: Engine Resilience v8.0 - Autonomous Loop Breaking & Qualitative Insights
summary:
### Overview 🌟
This PR significantly hardens the Specter testing engine against repetitive stalled states and introduces high-value qualitative data for the end-user. We've moved from reactive loop breaking to proactive "Depth-First" cognitive processing.

### Key Changes ✨
- **Cycle Detection**
